abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: As long as your opponent has 5 or more cards in his or her hand, any damage done to Pinsir by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

tests.name: armor_reduces_damage
tests.description: Test that Armor reduces damage by 30 when opponent has 5+ cards

tests.name: armor_no_reduction_under_5
tests.description: Test that Armor does not reduce damage when opponent has <5 cards
